aboutPreview.title: About me
aboutPreview.description:
I am Andrija Obradovic, graduate mathematician and web developer.
I develop modern web applications and digital products, from idea to finished solution. I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Git, Vercel and other tools. I also integrate AI tools into my development process to speed up workflows and improve application functionality.

metadata.title: About - Andrija Obradovic | AndrijaDev
metadata.description: Professional web development, design, and maintenance. Meet the developer behind the AndrijaDev brand.

hero.name: Andrija
hero.subtitle1: I help businesses bring their digital ideas to life.
hero.subtitle2: Turning your ideas into web applications.

bio.paragraph1: I hold a degree in Mathematics from the Faculty of Mathematics in Belgrade. The analytical approach I developed during my studies is something I now apply in web development. I build websites and web applications for clients who need reliable and modern solutions.
bio.paragraph2: Through the <brand>AndrijaDev</brand> brand, I work with entrepreneurs, small and large businesses on projects of various scopes, ranging from presentation websites to more complex applications with user accounts and databases. I focus on security and performance.
bio.paragraph3: After launch, I remain available for maintenance and further development, as I understand that a digital product continues to evolve immediately after deployment.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We discuss your idea and goals. With clear communication, we define the right goals and direction of the project.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: We define the architecture and project plan with a focus on code quality, maintainability and performance that will serve your product long-term and align with your goals.

development.title: Development
development.description: I build the solution using Next.js, React, TypeScript and Supabase, with regular progress updates and room to adapt as we go.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Production deployment with performance and SEO optimization. With the agreement, i remain available for maintenance, updates, and support after launch.

metadata.title: Services | AndrijaDev
metadata.description: Professional web development services including websites, web applications, design, maintenance, new features, and custom solutions.

hero.title: What I offer
hero.subtitle: I provide professional web solutions that help businesses digitally connect with the public and achieve their goals.

cost.question: How much does website development cost?
cost.answer: Pricing depends on project scope — number of pages, features, design, and integrations. After a brief discussion about your needs, you receive a clear quote tailored to your project.

timeline.question: How long does website development take?
timeline.answer: Simpler websites are usually ready in 2–4 weeks, while more complex web applications can take several months. The exact timeline is defined upfront, based on scope and your deadlines.

mobile.question: Will the site work well on mobile phones?
mobile.answer: Yes. All websites are built responsively — they adapt to phones, tablets, and desktops, with a focus on speed and readability.

content.question: Can I update the website content myself?
content.answer: It depends on the project. For simpler sites, I can set up a solution that lets you make changes on your own; for more complex applications, updates are handled as agreed, with clear documentation.

support.question: Do you offer support and maintenance after launch?
support.answer: Yes. After launch, I remain available for maintenance, updates, security patches, and further development — by agreement, according to your needs.

websites.title: Websites
websites.short: Professional, responsive websites built with modern technologies to represent your brand and engage your audience.

detail.p1: A website is the ideal solution for companies, entrepreneurs, and individuals who need a professional online presence without complex functionality or advanced systems. This type of website is designed for projects that do not require sophisticated implementations such as user registration and login systems, user accounts, or advanced business processes. The goal is to help visitors quickly find the information they need and easily get in touch with you.
detail.p2: I create modern, responsive, and optimized websites that effectively showcase your brand, services, and products while making a strong first impression on potential clients. My focus is on performance, clarity, and delivering an excellent user experience across all devices.
detail.p3: Whether you need a portfolio website, a company presentation website, or a multi-page informational website, every project is developed with a carefully crafted design that best represents your business online.

web-apps.title: Web Applications
web-apps.short: Custom web applications tailored to your business processes and needs, built with optimized performance, security, and long-term maintainability.

detail.p1: When your project requires more than a traditional website, I develop custom web applications designed for complex business processes and advanced functionality. Web applications allow users to interact with the system through account registration and authentication, as well as create, view, update, and delete data. These solutions are ideal for projects that require larger databases, process automation, and advanced business logic.
detail.p2: I build web applications using modern technologies such as Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase, with a strong focus on security, performance, and scalability. Every system is designed to be user-friendly, reliable, and flexible enough to support future growth and new features.
detail.p3: Whether you need an e-commerce platform, an online learning platform, a booking system, or any other type of web application, each project is developed according to your specific requirements to deliver a solution that effectively supports your business and provides an excellent user experience. After the project is completed, I can continue to provide maintenance, improvements, and technical support by prior agreement, ensuring that your application remains secure, stable, and ready for future growth.

design.title: Web Design
design.short: Clean, modern interface design of web presentation aligned with the needs of your brand, focused on usability and a professional visual impression.

detail.p1: Design is much more than just visual appearance, it plays a key role in how users perceive your brand and make decisions while interacting with your website. The first impression is formed within seconds, which is why a professional and carefully crafted design can significantly increase user trust and their willingness to engage.
detail.p2: Every color, shape, and visual element evokes specific emotions and influences user behavior. With the right choice of colors, typography, layout structure, and visual hierarchy, it is possible to guide user attention, improve content clarity, and create an experience that leaves a positive and professional impression. That is why it is essential that all elements are aligned with the brand identity and the goals of the website itself.
detail.p3: To ensure that your project makes the best possible impact, I offer UI/UX design services tailored to your needs. Whether you need a complete design for a new website, a redesign of an existing solution, or prototyping before development, the goal is to create a modern and functional interface that attracts users and contributes to the success of your business.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.short: Reliable support that keeps your website or application secure, up to date, and performing at its best.

detail.p1: Website or web application maintenance is essential for long-term stability, security, and performance. Modern technologies are constantly evolving, and regular updates bring new features, performance improvements, as well as fixes for existing bugs and security vulnerabilities. Without continuous maintenance, any digital product gradually becomes outdated and potentially exposed to risks.
detail.p2: That is why it is important to keep track of changes in libraries, frameworks, and system dependencies, as well as regularly optimize code and infrastructure. This approach ensures that your website or application remains fast, secure, and compatible with the latest standards and technologies, while maintaining a stable user experience.
detail.p3: As part of my services, I offer professional maintenance and technical support, including regular updates, bug fixes, security patches, and continuous system improvements to ensure your project always runs reliably and is ready for future growth.

new-features.title: New Features
new-features.short: Seamless integration of new functionality into your existing website or application without disrupting current operations.

detail.p1: As your business evolves, your digital platform must evolve with it. I integrate new features into existing websites and applications, extending functionality while preserving stability and user experience.
detail.p2: Before any code is written, I assess the current architecture and plan the integration to minimize risk. New features are developed following the same standards as the original build, with thorough testing before deployment.
detail.p3: From contact forms and user dashboards to third-party API integrations and payment systems, each addition is implemented cleanly and documented for future reference. Your platform grows with your business without unnecessary complexity.

custom-solutions.title: Custom Solutions
custom-solutions.short: Technical solutions for unique requirements that fall outside standard service categories.

detail.p1: Not every project has to fit into predefined service categories. If you have a unique idea, a specific problem, or a project that does not fall into standard solutions, it is possible to develop a fully customized solution tailored to your needs.
detail.p2: The process begins when you send your idea, requirements, or a description of the problem you want to solve through the contact form. After that, I analyze the possibilities, propose a technical approach, and together we define the best way to bring it to life.
detail.p3: In this way, every project becomes a collaborative process where an idea is transformed into a concrete digital solution. Regardless of complexity, the goal is to deliver a functional, high-quality, and reliable product that fully matches your vision.
